title: Crude oil gains following further drawdowns in inventories
section_path: Crude oil gains following further drawdowns in inventories
section_path_text: Crude oil gains following further drawdowns in inventories
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets were mixed as signs of tightness via lower inventories was weighed against the gloomy economic backdrop. Sentiment in China's markets remains positive amid ongoing rumours of an easing in COVID-19 restrictions. Crude oil rallied amid signs of further tightness.
